---
title: "Quoted in *The Washington Post* on viral crowdfunding"
date: "2024-03-12"
categories: [media]
outlet: "The Washington Post"
outlet_url: "https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2024/03/11/tiktok-unhoused-man-gofundme/"
---

I was quoted in Kyle Swenson and Amber Ferguson's article, ["A TikToker raised $400K for an unhoused man. Then things got messy."](https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2024/03/11/tiktok-unhoused-man-gofundme/), in *The Washington Post*, on a viral crowdfunding campaign in D.C., drawing on findings from my book [*GoFailMe*](/book/) (Stanford University Press), about amateur fundraisers being unprepared to manage the large sums they raise overnight.
